content: Add commit message validation in pre-commit check to ensure task ID from todo-list.json
Implement automatic task completion time tracking with codegoat prefix in commit messages
Add automatic duration calculation for completed tasks based on commit timestamps
Create commit message parser to extract task IDs and update todo-list.json automatically
Add line charts for success rate tracking over time in analytics
Add line charts for average duration tracking over time in analytics
Enable unlimited pagination in recent validation runs section
Verify and fix refresh button functionality in analytics page
